hero.headline: About AI Now Guide
hero.subheadline: The public operating window into a real AI-first digital asset portfolio.

content.body:
AI Now Guide is not a traditional course, guru funnel, or polished tutorial brand.

It is the public documentation of a real working process. The portfolio behind these sessions spans 80+ digital properties across SEO, medical marketing, AI art, datasets, and more.

Krisada has been building digital assets for 25 years. AI Now Guide is where that work becomes visible in real time.

The work is the content. The content is the work.
content.about_krisada: 25-year SEO practitioner. Digital asset portfolio builder. PHP/JSON architect. AI workflow early adopter. Building in public since the tools got good enough to show the process without embarrassment.
content.contact_note: Private property work, architecture planning, or implementation support is available only by request and priced to protect the build schedule.

seo.meta_description: About AI Now Guide: the public operating window into a real AI-first digital asset portfolio being built in real time by Krisada.
